problem_slide.problem_statement: SMBs struggle with fragmented financial tools, high costs, and slow onboarding, leading to cash flow bottlenecks and missed growth opportunities.
problem_slide.market_gap: A unified, AI-driven platform that offers instant credit scoring, automated invoicing, and real-time cash flow analytics tailored for SMBs.

solution_slide.solution_overview: FinEdge provides an all-in-one digital banking suite for SMBs, delivering instant credit lines, automated invoicing, and AI-powered cash flow forecasting within a single, secure platform.
key_features: Instant AI credit line up to 30% of monthly revenue
solution_slide.technology_behind: Hybrid cloud architecture, TensorFlow-based credit model, GraphQL API, Hyperledger Fabric for audit logs
